characters.appearance: Young adult female of South Asian descent with a medium complexion. She has long, wavy dark brown hair, dark-rimmed glasses, and a small nose ring.
characters.wardrobe: A light blue, long-sleeved button-up top with subtle white embroidery.

characters.appearance: Adult white male with short brown hair.
A white, glossy humanoid robot with visible panel seams. It has a human-like face, blue eyes, and a glowing blue circular light on its chest.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Office mein sabko lagta tha meri English weak hai, and they were making fun of my accent. [Everyone in the office thought my English was weak, and they were making fun of my accent.]
Character A says: But I have a secret. Let's see their reaction. [But I have a secret. Let's see their reaction.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer with a relatable workplace insecurity (being judged for English).
- Sets up a satisfying 'reveal' or revenge-success moment.
- Establishes the protagonist as someone who took charge of her own learning.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: Office mein sabko lagta tha meri English weak hai... Let's see their reaction. Supernova

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: I'd like to propose a different approach to this project. [I'd like to propose a different approach to this project.]
Character B says: Wait, what did you say? [Wait, what did you say?]
Character A says: A different approach. [A different approach.]
Character B says: Wow, tumhari English itni improve kaise hui? [Wow, how did your English improve so much?]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Demonstrates the real-world payoff of using the app (speaking confidently in a meeting).
- Provides social validation through the colleague's surprised reaction.
- Transitions the ad from the problem to the solution phase.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: I'd like to propose a different approach to this project. Wait, what did you say? A different approach. Wow, tumhari English itni improve kaise hui? Supernova

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Lunch ke baad main phone par reels nahi dekhti thi. [I wasn't watching reels on my phone after lunch.]
Character A says: I was practicing my English with this. [I was practicing my English with this.]
Character A says: Iska naam Supernova hai. [Its name is Supernova.]
Character A says: It's like having a personal AI English tutor. [It's like having a personal AI English tutor.]
Character A says: Look, let me show you. [Look, let me show you.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Introduces Supernova as the secret tool behind her success.
- Positions the app as a productive alternative to doomscrolling.
- Clearly defines the core value prop: a personal AI English tutor on your phone.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: Lunch ke baad main phone par reels nahi dekhti thi. I was practicing my English with this. Iska naam Supernova hai. It's like having a personal AI English tutor. Look, let me show you. Supernova

scenes.supernova_script:
Character C says: Kya aap bhi bina dare English bolna chahte hain? [Do you also want to speak English without fear?]
Character C says: Supernova ke AI tutor ke saath roz practice karein. [Practice daily with Supernova's AI tutor.]
Character C says: Yeh aapki mistakes correct karta hai, bilkul ek dost ki tarah, so you learn without even noticing. [It corrects your mistakes, just like a friend, so you learn without even noticing.]
Character C says: Let's try it together. [Let's try it together.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Replaces the competitor's unrealistic 'native in 1 week' claim with a relatable goal: speaking without fear.
- Explains the mechanism: daily practice and friendly, real-time correction.
- Invites the user into a live demonstration.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: Kya aap bhi bina dare English bolna chahte hain? Supernova ke AI tutor ke saath roz practice karein. Yeh aapki mistakes correct karta hai, bilkul ek dost ki tarah. Let's try it together. SPEAK ENGLISH WITH CONFIDENCE! Supernova

scenes.supernova_script:
Character C says: Hello! Let's practice for your office meeting. [Hello! Let's practice for your office meeting.]
Character A says: Okay, I am ready. [Okay, I am ready.]
Character C says: How will you present your idea? [How will you present your idea?]
Character A says: I am having a good idea. [I am having a good idea.]
Character C says: Almost. You should say, I have a good idea. [Almost. You should say, I have a good idea.]
Character A says: Oh, main hamesha grammar mein atak jaati hoon. [Oh, I always get stuck on grammar.]
Character C says: Koi baat nahi. That is exactly why I am here to help you speak correctly. [No problem. That is exactly why I am here to help you speak correctly.]
Character A says: Par kya private tutors bohot expensive nahi hote? [But aren't private tutors very expensive?]
Character C says: Supernova is very affordable. You get daily speaking practice anytime, anywhere. [Supernova is very affordable. You get daily speaking practice anytime, anywhere.]
Character C says: It is designed specially for your daily real-world situations. [It is designed specially for your daily real-world situations.]
Character A says: Are you serious? [Are you serious?]
Character C says: Absolutely. Just real conversation practice with your AI tutor. [Absolutely. Just real conversation practice with your AI tutor.]
Character A says: Like, a real tutor? [Like, a real tutor?]
Character C says: Yes. I correct your grammar, your pronunciation, and help you speak with confidence. [Yes. I correct your grammar, your pronunciation, and help you speak with confidence.]
Character A says: Okay. Main aaj hi Supernova download karti hoon. [Okay. I will download Supernova today itself.]
Character C says: Great decision. Let's speak English together. [Great decision. Let's speak English together.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Shows the actual product experience through a relatable office-prep scenario.
- Addresses the user's pain point (getting stuck on grammar) with an encouraging, non-judgmental correction.
- Overcomes the price objection by framing Supernova as an affordable alternative to private tutors, removing the competitor's 'free' claim.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: Hello! Let's practice for your office meeting. Okay, I am ready. How will you present your idea? I am having a good idea. Almost. You should say, I have a good idea. Oh, main hamesha grammar mein atak jaati hoon. Koi baat nahi. That is exactly why I am here to help you speak correctly. Par kya private tutors bohot expensive nahi hote? Supernova is very affordable. You get daily speaking practice anytime, anywhere. It is designed specially for your daily real-world situations. Are you serious? Absolutely. Just real conversation practice with your AI tutor. Like, a real tutor? Yes. I correct your grammar, your pronunciation, and help you speak with confidence. Okay. Main aaj hi Supernova download karti hoon. Great decision. Let's speak English together. Supernova

scenes.supernova_script: Character C says: Aaj hi Supernova download karein aur confidence ke saath English bolein. [Download Supernova today and speak English with confidence.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers a clear, direct call to action.
- Reinforces the core brand promise of speaking with confidence.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: DOWNLOAD NOW! START PRACTICING Supernova Download on the App Store GET IT ON Google Play
